title: ActiveCampaign vs Drip (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ActiveCampaign vs Drip: pricing, features, automation, and CRM capabilities to find the best email marketing tool for your business.
intro: ActiveCampaign and Drip are both powerful email marketing platforms, but they cater to different business needs. ActiveCampaign excels as an all-in-one CRM and automation hub for general businesses, while Drip specializes in e-commerce integration and revenue tracking. Understanding their differences will help you choose the right platform for your specific requirements.
choose_a_if: You need an integrated CRM with email marketing capabilities
You want advanced automation with lead scoring and dynamic content
Budget is a primary concern and you prefer a lower entry price
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce business and need deep store integration
Revenue attribution and transaction tracking are critical
You want visual automation building specifically designed for online sellers

faq.a: It depends on your needs. ActiveCampaign is better for businesses requiring comprehensive CRM functionality and advanced automation at a lower price point. Drip is superior if you're an e-commerce business that needs specialized features like revenue attribution and seamless store integration.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Drip?
faq.a: ActiveCampaign is significantly cheaper, starting at $15/month compared to Drip's $39/month. This makes ActiveCampaign the more budget-friendly option for businesses just starting with email marketing automation.

faq.q: Can I switch from Drip to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, most email marketing platforms support data migration and export. Both ActiveCampaign and Drip allow you to export your contacts and campaign data, though you may lose some automation workflows that don't have direct equivalents during the transition.
